news.title:
ICRA reports power sector led FY26 rating upgrades on stable operations.
Improved execution and strong parent profiles drove performance, said ICRA.
news.summary:
ICRA reports power sector led FY26 rating upgrades on stable operations.
Improved execution and strong parent profiles drove performance, said ICRA.

news.title:
ICRA forecasts 7-8% cement industry growth in FY27 driven by housing, infra demand.
Profitability may suffer due to rising input costs, fuel prices, and geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
ICRA forecasts 7-8% cement industry growth in FY27 driven by housing, infra demand.
Profitability may suffer due to rising input costs, fuel prices, and geopolitical tensions.

news.title:
Rating agencies signal that India's corporate credit upgrades may have peaked due to global tensions and higher energy costs.
ICRA, Crisil, and India Ratings highlight balance sheet strength, but mid-tier firms and energy-dependent sectors remain vulnerable to disruptions.
news.summary:
Rating agencies signal that India's corporate credit upgrades may have peaked due to global tensions and higher energy costs.
ICRA, Crisil, and India Ratings highlight balance sheet strength, but mid-tier firms and energy-dependent sectors remain vulnerable to disruptions.

news.title:
ICRA reports resilient corporate credit profiles in FY26 with upgrades outpacing downgrades.
FY26 saw 388 upgrades vs. 124 downgrades, boosting credit ratio to 3.1x from 2x in FY25.
news.summary:
ICRA reports resilient corporate credit profiles in FY26 with upgrades outpacing downgrades.
FY26 saw 388 upgrades vs. 124 downgrades, boosting credit ratio to 3.1x from 2x in FY25.

news.title:
West Asia conflict may increase Indian realty construction costs by 5%.
Material prices rise; industry warns of April cost spike affecting real estate.
news.summary:
West Asia conflict may increase Indian realty construction costs by 5%.
Material prices rise; industry warns of April cost spike affecting real estate.

news.title:
ICRA highlights slow growth and rising costs in India's aviation sector.
Feb 2026 air traffic was 142.5 lakh, up 1.5% YoY but down 6.5% sequentially.
news.summary:
ICRA highlights slow growth and rising costs in India's aviation sector.
Feb 2026 air traffic was 142.5 lakh, up 1.5% YoY but down 6.5% sequentially.

news.title:
India's power demand growth may slow to 1% in FY26, lowest in 5 years: ICRA.
Electricity demand growth was muted at 0.8% YoY in March's first 22 days.
news.summary:
India's power demand growth may slow to 1% in FY26, lowest in 5 years: ICRA.
Electricity demand growth was muted at 0.8% YoY in March's first 22 days.

news.title:
ICRA revises Indian aviation outlook to negative from stable citing West Asia tensions.
Rupee depreciation and expected hike in ATF prices also influenced the outlook change.
news.summary:
ICRA revises Indian aviation outlook to negative from stable citing West Asia tensions.
Rupee depreciation and expected hike in ATF prices also influenced the outlook change.

news.title:
ICRA warns West Asia conflict may strain India's FY27 fiscal math, increasing subsidy burdens and pressuring revenues.
Elevated crude prices could impact excise collections, refining margins, and corporate tax revenues, risking fiscal deficit targets.
news.summary:
ICRA warns West Asia conflict may strain India's FY27 fiscal math, increasing subsidy burdens and pressuring revenues.
Elevated crude prices could impact excise collections, refining margins, and corporate tax revenues, risking fiscal deficit targets.

news.title:
Core sectors' growth slowed to 2.3% in Feb, a 3-month low, due to declines in crude oil, gas, and refinery output.
Icra's Aditi Nayar forecasts IIP growth to moderate to 4% in Feb, with potential GDP downsides due to higher fuel prices.
news.summary:
Core sectors' growth slowed to 2.3% in Feb, a 3-month low, due to declines in crude oil, gas, and refinery output.
Icra's Aditi Nayar forecasts IIP growth to moderate to 4% in Feb, with potential GDP downsides due to higher fuel prices.

news.title:
ICRA predicts rising slippages in retail and MSME loans, though overall asset quality remains strong.
Credit growth in FY26 reached Rs 20.3L crore, driven by GST cuts and robust demand in retail and MSME segments.
news.summary:
ICRA predicts rising slippages in retail and MSME loans, though overall asset quality remains strong.
Credit growth in FY26 reached Rs 20.3L crore, driven by GST cuts and robust demand in retail and MSME segments.

news.title:
Govt panel may review bank consolidation, foreign investor caps for Viksit Bharat: ICRA.
ICRA's Karthik Srinivasan highlights potential focus on lender consolidation and voting caps.
news.summary:
Govt panel may review bank consolidation, foreign investor caps for Viksit Bharat: ICRA.
ICRA's Karthik Srinivasan highlights potential focus on lender consolidation and voting caps.

news.title:
ICRA predicts Indian airlines' losses may rise to ₹17,000-18,000 crore in FY26.
Factors include weak rupee, rising crude prices, and disrupted international traffic.
news.summary:
ICRA predicts Indian airlines' losses may rise to ₹17,000-18,000 crore in FY26.
Factors include weak rupee, rising crude prices, and disrupted international traffic.

news.title:
Crude at $115/barrel may raise India's oil import bill by $64B annually.
Sustained surge in crude prices could impact FY27 at $110-$115/barrel.
news.summary:
Crude at $115/barrel may raise India's oil import bill by $64B annually.
Sustained surge in crude prices could impact FY27 at $110-$115/barrel.

news.title:
India's CAD widened to $13.2B in Q3FY26 vs $11.3B YoY due to higher MTD.
Net outflows under FDI also contributed to the CAD increase.
news.summary:
India's CAD widened to $13.2B in Q3FY26 vs $11.3B YoY due to higher MTD.
Net outflows under FDI also contributed to the CAD increase.

news.title:
ICRA warns Strait of Hormuz tensions may hike crude oil volatility, impacting India’s energy bill and OMC margins.
India’s crude (50%) & LNG (54%) imports depend on Hormuz, exposing risks despite efforts in diversified sourcing.
news.summary:
ICRA warns Strait of Hormuz tensions may hike crude oil volatility, impacting India’s energy bill and OMC margins.
India’s crude (50%) & LNG (54%) imports depend on Hormuz, exposing risks despite efforts in diversified sourcing.

news.title:
India unlikely to intervene after US imposes 126% duty on solar module exports.
Indian manufacturers advised to seek legal recourse and appeal in appropriate forums.
news.summary:
India unlikely to intervene after US imposes 126% duty on solar module exports.
Indian manufacturers advised to seek legal recourse and appeal in appropriate forums.

news.title:
Icra projects road construction pace to slow through FY27 due to weak project awards.
Construction by ministry expected at 9,000-10,000 km in FY26-27, down from 10,660 km in FY25.
news.summary:
Icra projects road construction pace to slow through FY27 due to weak project awards.
Construction by ministry expected at 9,000-10,000 km in FY26-27, down from 10,660 km in FY25.

news.title:
GDP growth slowed to 7.4% in Q3 due to govt spending cuts.
Economists project FY26 GDP at 7.5%, above RBI's 7.3% estimate.
news.summary:
GDP growth slowed to 7.4% in Q3 due to govt spending cuts.
Economists project FY26 GDP at 7.5%, above RBI's 7.3% estimate.

news.title:
India's CV industry surged 27% YoY in Jan 2026, driven by GST rate cut and increased freight activity, per ICRA.
M&HCV retail volumes grew 15.4% YoY; LCVs rose 14.9%, but high funding costs remain a challenge, ICRA noted.
news.summary:
India's CV industry surged 27% YoY in Jan 2026, driven by GST rate cut and increased freight activity, per ICRA.
M&HCV retail volumes grew 15.4% YoY; LCVs rose 14.9%, but high funding costs remain a challenge, ICRA noted.
